focus.title: 今日要览：4 个类目共 20 条更新
focus.body:
【AI 最新信息】Google Vids now lets you star in your own AI videos
【金融新闻】拓展特色品类 各地补贴分层惠民撬动万亿消费
【中国新闻】外媒：尼加拉瓜宣布与意大利断交
【世界新闻】One man's hunger strike changed India's map. Can it still change politics?

items.title: Google Vids now lets you star in your own AI videos
items.summary: Google is adding personalized AI avatars to Vids that let users create videos starring a digital version of themselves, alongside Gemini Omni-powered tools for

items.title: Roblox launches an AI-powered game-creation feature in its mobile app
items.summary: Roblox's new "Build" feature lets users generate basic games using a single text prompt.

items.title: Google’s AI Mode now lets you link and interact with select apps
items.summary: With this new update, Google is expanding AI Mode beyond answering questions and into completing tasks across the apps they use regularly.

items.title: Yes, you can now order DoorDash from the command line
items.summary: DoorDash is opening a limited beta of dd-cli, a command-line tool that lets developers and AI agents search stores, build carts, and place orders from the termi

items.title: Why is OpenAI selling a ChatGPT basketball?
items.summary: You may have heard that OpenAI released its first piece of hardware this week. You may not have heard about the ChatGPT basketball.

items.title: 拓展特色品类 各地补贴分层惠民撬动万亿消费
items.summary: 国家统计局数据显示，2026年上半年社会商品和服务零售总额同比增长2.7%，居民消费支出同步改善，上半年全国居民人均消费支出14836元，名义同比增长3.7%。在商品零售的几个大类中，比如家电、手机、汽车、装修，国家都给予了专项消费补贴。购物前，先问一句“有国补吗？”，已经成为中国消费者的口头禅。

items.title: 赴华机票销量暴涨 老外为何扎堆来中国“避暑”
items.summary: 眼下国内已正式“入伏”

items.title: 大数据观察：全国统一电力市场建设按下“加速键”
items.summary: 市场化交易电量占全社会用电量比重连续4年超60%

items.title: “AI陪伴”新规下监管如何真正落地
items.summary: 记者实测多款应用：AI标识弱化、部分智能体人设引发担忧

items.title: 网友热议暑假开启 暑期消费乘热而上
items.summary: 网友热议暑假开启——

items.title: 外媒：尼加拉瓜宣布与意大利断交
items.summary: 中新网7月17日电 据路透社报道，尼加拉瓜当地时间16日宣布与意大利断绝外交关系。

items.title: 极端暴雨天气会否常态化 专家解析今夏风雨为何格外大
items.summary: 近期台风肆虐、暴雨连连。无论南北，公众直观感觉今夏风雨来得不仅早，且强度令人惊骇。今年的风雨为何格外大？为何台风从南方登陆，北方也要遭殃？我国主汛期还有哪里易发极端天气？未来早发、多发、高强度的极端暴雨天气等是否会成为常态？中青报·中青网记者请国家气候中心、中央气象台、中国科学院大气物理研究所的多位专家一一解答。

items.title: 美国6月零售销售额环比增长0.2% 低于市场预期
items.summary: 中新社华盛顿7月16日电 (记者 沙晗汀)美国商务部当地时间16日公布数据显示，美国6月零售销售额环比增长0.2%，低于市场普遍预期。

items.title: 美军称在阿曼湾登上一艘油轮进行检查
items.summary: 中新网7月17日电 据外媒报道，美军中央司令部16日在社交媒体发布消息称，美海军陆战队员当天在阿曼湾登上一艘油轮进行检查。

items.title: 委内瑞拉强震遇难人数升至4930人
items.summary: 中新网7月17日电 据外媒报道，委内瑞拉全国代表大会主席豪尔赫·罗德里格斯16日在社交媒体发文称，该国6月24日发生的两次强震已造成4930人死亡、16740人受伤。

items.title: One man's hunger strike changed India's map. Can it still change politics?
items.summary: Why hunger strikes still shape Indian politics, from Gandhi to Sonam Wangchuk.

items.title: At least one dead in Texas floods ravaging same area where campers died
items.summary: The same area devastated by floods last year's floods, which caused more than 130 deaths, is once again being hit.

items.title: I thought we'd grow old together, says band leader whose girlfriend died in Thai bar inferno
items.summary: Athipat Wichan tells BBC Thai he regrets bringing his girlfriend Nahathai into his indie band Thotsakan.

items.title: As heatwaves strike, Europeans turn to prized Chinese air-conditioner
items.summary: Previously little-known in Europe, the Midea PortaSplit has become a household name this summer.

items.title: Blasts reported in Iran as US launches new wave of strikes
items.summary: The US says its attacks aim to "further degrade Iranian military capabilities", as fighting continued for the sixth day in a row.

items.title: xai-org/grok-build（⭐ 11977）
items.summary: SpaceXAI's coding agent harness and TUI. Fullscreen, mouse interactive, extensible.

items.title: Fei-Away/Codex-Dream-Skin（⭐ 5284）
items.summary: Codex Dream Skin

items.title: MDX-Tom/gpt-5.6-instruct（⭐ 1666）
items.summary: A Codex CLI jailbreak prompt and test pack for gpt-5.6-sol. 针对 gpt-5.6 系列的 Codex CLI 破甲提示词与测试包。

items.title: littledivy/mimic（⭐ 1102）
items.summary: Intercept any app, then call it from Python like a library

items.title: pixel-point/aval（⭐ 1039）
items.summary: A new open-source format for interactive video on the web, with a built-in state machine, frame-accurate transitions, and packed-alpha transparency.
